div1.entryFree: Marshal, vb. to direct, to lead: thou --est me the way that I was going, Mcb. II, 1, 42. they must sweep my way and m. me to knavery, Hml. III, 4, 205. when these mutualities so m. the way, hard at hand comes the master and main exercise, Oth. II, 1, 268. m. the rest, as they deserve their grace, Per. II, 3, 19.
